tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Artichoke is an edible flower bud known for its unique structure.
  • It has a mild, nutty flavor.
  • Used in salads, dips, and cooked dishes.
  • Popular in Mediterranean cuisine.
  • Highly nutritious.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: • Only the bud is eaten, not the full flower.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Banana flower is the edible blossom of the banana plant.
  • It has a slightly bitter taste.
  • Used in curries and traditional dishes.
  • Common in South Indian cuisine.
  • Highly nutritious.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Broccoli is a green flowering vegetable with small buds.
  • It has a mild, slightly bitter taste.
  • Used in stir-fries, soups, and salads.
  • Highly nutritious.
  • Popular worldwide.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Cauliflower is a white flowering vegetable with dense florets.
  • It has a mild flavor.
  • Used in curries, stir-fries, and roasted dishes.
  • Versatile in cooking.
  • Widely consumed globally.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: • Available in purple and orange varieties too.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Drumstick flower comes from the moringa tree.
  • It has a mild flavor.
  • Used in traditional Indian dishes.
  • Highly nutritious.
  • Also used in herbal remedies.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: • Moringa is known as a superfood plant.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Pumpkin flower is an edible flower from the pumpkin plant.
  • It has a soft texture.
  • Used in fried and stuffed dishes.
  • Popular in various cuisines.
  • Delicate and nutritious.

tab1.title: Details
tab1.content:
• Zucchini flower is an edible blossom of the zucchini plant.
  • It has a delicate flavor.
  • Often used in gourmet dishes.
  • Stuffed and fried or added to salads.
  • Popular in Italian cuisine.
